'''''KV-29233-44B''''' was a prototype of a large type of space [[Freighter/Legends|barge]]. It was purchased by the [[Zirtran brothers]]. On the initial [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump, its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] failed completely, leaving the Zirtrans with a stranded ship in the middle of nowhere. A group of [[Geelan]]s subsequently bought the ship and converted into a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that would eventually be known as [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']]. Among the denizens of ''Zirtran's Anchor'', ''KV-29233-44B'' was better known as "[[The Hub (Zirtran's Anchor)|The Hub]]."
